title: Security Tools
description: Security tools: hash generator, htpasswd, strong password, credential detector.

en.feature.hash.explain: Generate hashes such as MD5 and SHA-1/256/384/512.
en.feature.password.explain: Generate strong random passwords with configurable options.

zh_CN.title: 安全工具
zh_CN.description: 安全工具：哈希、htpasswd、强密码、凭证检测。
zh_CN.feature.password.explain: 生成可配置的强随机密码。
